design_philosophy: A brutalist, high-performance 'command center' mixed with the viral, endless scroll of TikTok. Built for day traders who need raw data, fast decisions, and high-adrenaline social proof. Avoid 'soft' SaaS vibes.

rules.headings: tracking-tight, use font-black for extreme emphasis
rules.data: tabular-nums for all numbers, prices, tickers, and percentages

layout.spacing_scale: Highly dense for data components (p-2 to p-4) and generous for section dividers (py-12).
layout.feed_container: w-full max-w-lg mx-auto min-h-screen pb-24 pt-20
layout.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-16 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 z-50 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)]
layout.top_ticker: fixed top-0 w-full h-8 bg-zinc-900 border-b border-white/10 z-50 overflow-hidden flex items-center text-xs font-mono text-white tracking-widest uppercase

feed_post.style: cardless, full-width on mobile, separated by 1px solid border-border (border-b-8 border-black/50 for strong separation)
feed_post.media: aspect-[4/5] sm:aspect-square bg-zinc-900 w-full relative object-cover
feed_post.ai_verdict_bar: flex justify-between items-center px-4 py-3 bg-zinc-900/50 border-y border-white/5 text-sm font-mono backdrop-blur-md absolute bottom-0 w-full

badges.win: bg-[#00C805] text-black px-2 py-1 rounded-sm font-bold text-xs tracking-wider
badges.loss: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white px-2 py-1 rounded-sm font-bold text-xs tracking-wider

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-bold transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-none px-6 py-2 font-bold transition-colors
buttons.camera_fab: w-14 h-14 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center -translate-y-6 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)] text-black hover:scale-105 transition-transform

inputs.style: bg-transparent border border-white/20 rounded-none focus:border-white focus:ring-0 placeholder:text-zinc-500 transition-colors

tabs.style: flex space-x-6 border-b border-white/10 px-4 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide

images.logo: Text-based logo: 'TRADEFEEDX' in font-black tracking-tighter. No placeholder image required.

technical_instructions.styling: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the main scrolling feed to ensure maximum performance (Shadcn cards add unnecessary DOM nesting). Use Shadcn ONLY for interactive state components like Settings Dialogs, Tabs, Forms.
technical_instructions.accessibility: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid.
technical_instructions.mobile_requirements: Mobile-first approach is mandatory. Bottom nav must always remain fixed and visible. Use pb-[env(safe-area-inset-bottom)] to clear iOS home indicator.
